description: Fix CLI bin symlinks not being created after the standard Getting Started workflow (npm install && npm run build). npm workspaces only create bin symlinks during install if the target files exist, but dist/cli.js doesn't exist until after build. Add npm rebuild to the build scripts so bin symlinks are always refreshed after compilation.

userStories.title: Add npm rebuild to build scripts to fix workspace bin symlinks
userStories.description: As a platform contributor, I want `npx opentabs --help` and `npx opentabs-plugin --help` to work after `npm install && npm run build` so that CLI entrypoints are usable without discovering the need for `npm rebuild`.
acceptanceCriteria: The `build` script in root package.json ends with `&& npm rebuild @opentabs-dev/cli @opentabs-dev/plugin-tools` (or equivalent) after the existing steps
The `build:force` script in root package.json ends with the same npm rebuild step
After `rm -rf node_modules && npm install && npm run build`, `node_modules/.bin/opentabs` symlink exists and points to `../@opentabs-dev/cli/dist/cli.js`
After `rm -rf node_modules && npm install && npm run build`, `node_modules/.bin/opentabs-plugin` symlink exists and points to `../@opentabs-dev/plugin-tools/dist/cli.js`
After build, `npx opentabs --help` prints help text and exits 0
After build, `npx opentabs-plugin --help` prints help text and exits 0
userStories.notes:
Root cause: npm workspaces create bin symlinks during `npm install`, but only if the target file already exists on disk. Since `platform/cli/package.json` has `"bin": {"opentabs": "./dist/cli.js"}` and `platform/plugin-tools/package.json` has `"bin": {"opentabs-plugin": "./dist/cli.js"}`, the symlinks are skipped because `dist/cli.js` doesn't exist until after `tsc --build` runs.

Fix: In `package.json` (root, lines ~19-20), append `&& npm rebuild @opentabs-dev/cli @opentabs-dev/plugin-tools` to both the `build` and `build:force` scripts. This is fast (<1s) since there are no native addons — it just re-links the bin entries.

The current `build` script is:
```
tsc --build && npm run --prefix platform/browser-extension build:bundle && npm run --prefix platform/browser-extension build:side-panel && tsx scripts/generate-icons.ts && tsx scripts/install-extension.ts
```

Append `&& npm rebuild @opentabs-dev/cli @opentabs-dev/plugin-tools` to the end. Do the same for `build:force`.

Verification: After the change, run `rm -rf node_modules && npm install && npm run build` then check `ls -la node_modules/.bin/opentabs*` shows the symlinks, and `npx opentabs --help` works.
